summary: Created kb:ingest CLI command that accepts --source path, copies JSON files to company-hq/kb/raw/<source>/, and creates manifest.json with metadata (source, imported_at, original_path, files). Includes --force flag for non-interactive overwrite.

codeReviewIssues.description: Initial implementation used namespace import (import * as pc) for picocolors which doesn't work correctly with ES module bundling
codeReviewIssues.fix: Changed to default import (import pc from 'picocolors') - fix committed in 73dc1952

manualVerification.result: Shows kb commands: ingest, compile, normalize, output

notes: Worker session: 63ae606c-8d23-4767-a4c1-70c4304cb419. Implementation complete and tested. Minor import issue fixed in follow-up commit.
